name: Wild Rice Waldorf Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except nuts in a large bowl.
2. Toss the mixture until well combined.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 3 to 4 hours, or until thoroughly chilled.
4. Just before serving, sprinkle the chopped dry roasted peanuts on top.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
